name: mdclip
title: MdClip
description: Find local Markdown files and copy their contents for reuse.
author: uchimanajet7

commands.name: markdown-source-1
commands.title: Markdown Source 1
commands.description: Browse Markdown files from Markdown Source 1.

commands.name: markdown-source-2
commands.title: Markdown Source 2
commands.description: Browse Markdown files from Markdown Source 2.

commands.name: markdown-source-3
commands.title: Markdown Source 3
commands.description: Browse Markdown files from Markdown Source 3.

commands.name: all-markdown-sources
commands.title: All Markdown Sources
commands.description: Search Markdown files across all enabled Markdown Sources.

preferences.name: folder1Enabled
preferences.title: Markdown Source 1
preferences.label: Enable Markdown Source 1
preferences.description: Include Markdown Source 1 in its command and All Markdown Sources.

preferences.name: folder1Directory
preferences.title: Markdown Source 1 Folder
preferences.description: Folder that Markdown Source 1 reads Markdown files from.

preferences.name: folder1DisplayName
preferences.title: Markdown Source 1 Name
preferences.description: Name shown for Markdown Source 1 inside MdClip lists and metadata. This does not rename the Raycast Root Search command. The folder name is used when empty.

preferences.name: folder2Enabled
preferences.title: Markdown Source 2
preferences.label: Enable Markdown Source 2
preferences.description: Include Markdown Source 2 in its command and All Markdown Sources.

preferences.name: folder2Directory
preferences.title: Markdown Source 2 Folder
preferences.description: Folder that Markdown Source 2 reads Markdown files from.

preferences.name: folder2DisplayName
preferences.title: Markdown Source 2 Name
preferences.description: Name shown for Markdown Source 2 inside MdClip lists and metadata. This does not rename the Raycast Root Search command. The folder name is used when empty.

preferences.name: folder3Enabled
preferences.title: Markdown Source 3
preferences.label: Enable Markdown Source 3
preferences.description: Include Markdown Source 3 in its command and All Markdown Sources.

preferences.name: folder3Directory
preferences.title: Markdown Source 3 Folder
preferences.description: Folder that Markdown Source 3 reads Markdown files from.

preferences.name: folder3DisplayName
preferences.title: Markdown Source 3 Name
preferences.description: Name shown for Markdown Source 3 inside MdClip lists and metadata. This does not rename the Raycast Root Search command. The folder name is used when empty.

preferences.name: editor
preferences.title: Editor
preferences.description: Editor used to open Markdown files.

preferences.name: previewLineCount
preferences.title: Preview Line Count
preferences.description: Number of leading lines to show in the preview.

preferences.name: previewMaxCharacters
preferences.title: Preview Max Characters
preferences.description: Maximum number of characters to show in the preview.

scripts.lint: npm run check:dependencies && npm run check:type && npm run check:lint && npm run check:format && npm run check:local
